steps.t: Ithurga suspects this is a replica and wants you to confirm all the rumours about this hammer from the town's residents.
All the witnesses had varying tales, but a professor has told us Shereb knows of this hammer. You can find Shereb in the most isolated part of Halrax.
You've gathered all the information you can from the townsfolk of Halrax. You now have a lead. You should talk to Ithurga. Ithurga can be found in Hal…
